code_dossier.name: TraceIdFilter.java
code_dossier.description: A Spring Web filter that extracts trace ID from incoming HTTP request headers and propagates it through the request lifecycle via SLF4J MDC for distributed tracing and log correlation purposes.

data.detailed_description:
TraceIdFilter is a critical middleware component in the authentication server that implements distributed tracing functionality. It extends Spring's OncePerRequestFilter to ensure the filter logic executes exactly once per request, even in complex filter chain scenarios.

The filter intercepts all incoming HTTP requests and checks for the presence of an "X-Trace-Id" header. When found, this trace ID is stored in SLF4J's Mapped Diagnostic Context (MDC), making it available to all logging statements throughout the request processing lifecycle. This enables log correlation across distributed services, which is essential for debugging and monitoring microservices architectures.

The implementation follows a proper try-finally pattern to ensure MDC cleanup after request processing, preventing memory leaks and trace ID leakage between requests in thread-pooled environments. The filter is automatically registered as a Spring component through the @Component annotation.

Key technical aspects:
- Uses OncePerRequestFilter for guaranteed single execution
- Leverages MDC for thread-local storage of trace context
- Implements proper resource cleanup in finally block
- Follows non-blocking filter chain delegation pattern
responsibilities: Extract X-Trace-Id header from incoming HTTP requests for distributed tracing support
Store trace ID in SLF4J MDC to enable log correlation across the request lifecycle
Ensure proper cleanup of MDC context after request completion to prevent thread pollution
Delegate request processing to the next filter in the chain while maintaining trace context
Enable cross-service request tracking in microservices architecture

interfaces.name: doFilterInternal

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: The incoming HTTP servlet request object

parameters.name: filterChain
parameters.description: The filter chain for delegating to subsequent filters

interfaces.description: Core filter method that extracts trace ID from request header, stores it in MDC, processes the request through the filter chain, and ensures cleanup
